markdown:
# Boon of the Night Spirit

You gain the following benefits.

## Merge with Shadows

While within [[dim_light Light]] or [[darkness]], you can give yourself the [[invisible]] condition as a [[bonus_action Action]]. The condition ends on you immediately after you take an action, a [[bonus_action Action]], or a [[reaction]].

## Shadowy Form

While within [[dim_light Light]] or [[darkness]], you have [[resistance]] to all damage except Psychic and Radiant.
